grammarNote.title: The End: Understanding Everything
grammarNote.explanation:
C'est la fin. Avril se débrouille. On traite le monde. — débrouiller means to manage, to figure things out. Se débrouiller = to manage by oneself.

Look back at chapter 1: C'est la mer. Now: C'est la fin. The same pattern, but you understand so much more.

Re-read this chapter, then re-read chapter 1. Notice how far you've come. Vous comprenez le français.
